use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH HEPATIC VENO-OCCLUSIVE DISEASE (VOD), ALSO KNOWN AS SINUSOIDAL OBSTRUCTION SYNDROME (SOS), WITH RENAL OR PULMONARY DYSFUNCTION FOLLOWING HEMATOPOIETIC STEM-CELL TRANSPLANTATION (HSCT)

indications.text:
DEFITELIO is indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with hepatic veno-occlusive disease
(VOD), also known as sinusoidal obstruction syndrome (SOS), with renal or pulmonary dysfunction following
hematopoietic stem-cell transplantation (HSCT).
